title: palicourea quibdoana
intro: Palicourea quibdoana, also known as the Quibdoan palicourea, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a traditional medicinal plant native to the Chocó Department in Colombia, used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Palicourea quibdoana include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Palicourea quibdoana include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically prepared by local communities and used in traditional medicine.
